prompt: Use $ieee-power-engineering-letter-writing to compress a full-paper idea about a convex relaxation counterexample into an IEEE power-system Letter introduction and technical core.
expected: The output identifies one hard claim, applies the near-neighbor literature gate when PowerLit is available, checks the result against Letter review standards, and returns compact Letter prose rather than a shortened full paper.

prompt: Use $ieee-power-engineering-letter-writing to assess whether a proposed Letter on a sensitivity index is still publishable if PowerLit finds a prior Letter with the same problem, mechanism, and evidence object.
expected: The response refuses simple rephrasing and recommends narrowing the claim, changing the technical object, retargeting, or not submitting; it must not present the Letter as review-ready.
